name: Sabra Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
FILLING:
3 large eggs -- beaten
1 cup sugar
3 (8 oz) packages cream cheese
12 ounces semisweet chocolate chips
1 cup sour cream
3/4 cup butter
2 tablespoons vanilla extract
Chocolate curls -- for garnish
Whipped cream -- for garnish
CRUST:
Mix together the crumbs, sugar, grated orange peel, and chocolate with melted butter.
Combine well and press into a heavily buttered 8-inch springform pan, evenly covering the bottom and about an inch of the sides.
FILLING:
Beat together the eggs and sugar until very light. Soften the cream cheese and beat it until fluffy. Gradually add to the egg mixture, beating to combine thoroughly.
In the top of a double boiler over simmering water, combine chocolate and butter. When chocolate is melted and mixed with butter, remove from heat and add sour cream and vanilla. Mix.
Add to the cheese mixture and mix until smooth.
Pour batter into prepared pan and bake in a preheated 325°F oven for 2 hours or until center of cake is firm. Cool on rack and refrigerate overnight.
Decorate with chocolate curls and whipped cream.
NOTE: The amount of vanilla extract called for seems excessive. Use your judgement.
